description_long: This is a dark gray, boxy four-door sedan with a classic, utilitarian design reminiscent of late 20th-century Eastern European cars. The body features sharp, angular lines, a flat roof, and a slightly sloped rear trunk. The windows are tinted and the door handles, side mirrors, and trim are rendered in a metallic silver color. The wheels are simple, dark, and appear to have a solid hubcap design. The front and rear lights are rectangular, with the rear lights incorporating red and amber sections. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, practical vehicle suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark gray, boxy four-door sedan with angular lines, tinted windows, and simple dark wheels. The design is utilitarian and classic, with metallic trim and rectangular lights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sedan, four doors, metallic trim, and simple dark wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rectangular taillights, trunk, and absence of a visible license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing four doors and metallic trim.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rectangular headlights, grille, and hood details.
attribute_wheel_design: Solid dark hubcap with no visible spokes or distinctive features
